ambiguity_risks: A reader may import an unstated service capability; option evaluation is limited to the explicit constraints and approved claims.
A broadly workable alternative must still fail at least one explicit requirement.
expected_keyed_answer_properties: Satisfies every explicit material requirement and constraint.
Uses only behavior supported by the listed approved claims.
Wins under the stated minimum-operational-overhead prioritizer.

material_constraints.description: The organization has all features enabled.
The prohibited action applies to member accounts; management-account access is separately controlled.
An IAM Identity Center organization instance is enabled; an account instance is not used for account access.
The prohibited actions concern IAM users and roles subject to SCPs, not service-linked roles.

material_requirements.description: Provide reusable workforce access assignments across member accounts.
Keep prohibited actions outside the maximum permissions of affected member-account principals.
Do not treat a guardrail as a permission grant.

originality_notes: Constructed from the accepted design theme and approved atomic claims without copying an exam guide, sample question, question bank, or live-exam expression.
Scenario nouns, requirement combination, option order, and explanatory wording are original to this project.
scenario_theme: Pair centrally assigned temporary workforce access with member-account maximum-permission guardrails.
